in: DbInstancesService 6-step atomic create with rollback + lifecycle (start/stop/restart/remove/rotatePassword/reconcile)
SELinux container_file_t labelling via install.sh relabel_path() helper
PMM PromQL client (5 failure reasons taxonomy, never throws) + 30s in-memory cache
Sheet drawer primitive shared between /databases and /websites
External-conf reconcile (HOST_NGINX_CONFD_DIR scan + server_name conflict detection)
PHP-FPM auto-provision (managed mode for empty PHP_FPM_SOCKET_PATH, external for unix:/path or tcp://host:port)
ACME_EMAIL env-first + settings fallback (throws ACME_EMAIL_MISSING on neither)
/databases route + drawer (Connection + PMM summary + Lifecycle sections)
/websites refactor to Sheet drawer with External badge for managed_by_dinopanel=false rows
out: SecretsService — deferred to v0.5 paired with audit log integration (decisions.md Q4)
PMM auto-register on instance create — Phase 6 stretch, deferred
Operator-customisable PromQL bundles — fixed in driver code for v0.4 (decisions.md Q5)
Playwright e2e (databases-create-mysql, rotate-password, pmm-card, websites-drawer-refactor) — Rocky smoke covers integration gate

decisionsSummary: Q1 → all-container, uniform (no native systemd path)
Q3 → plaintext credentials in connection card (no per-secret crypto)
Q4 → SecretsService deferred to v0.5 (paired with audit log)
Q5 → PMM API summary cards + keep Open in PMM link-card (integrator, not reimplementer)
carryOverFromV03: Drawer / Sheet primitive (replaces v0.3 inline detail panel on /websites)
UI for ACME_EMAIL (env-only → settings with env fallback)
External-conf import in reconcile (managed | external discriminator)

verification.build: pass — main gzip 114.89 kB < 140 kB · /databases chunk gzip 4.73 kB < 100 kB · /websites chunk gzip 3.79 kB < 90 kB
verification.liveSmokeReleasedAs: v0.4.0 — see smoke-pass.md once Rocky 234 run is logged

knownFollowups: S7 PMM summary cards on Rocky 234 — defer until PMM is reachable from the test host
Playwright e2e — backfill from Rocky smoke evidence when CI infrastructure lands
PMM auto-register on instance create — stretch goal, re-evaluate if operators ask
SecretsService — encrypt acme_accounts.key_pem + acme.cloudflare.api_token + db_instances.password; planned for v0.5 alongside audit-log integration
